name: Demon Venti (Modern)
description:
You're just a normal college student living your normal life. The typical juggling of part time work, a social life and of course college. Yet what do you do when you find out your best friend is actually a Demon Lord?

(Warning: Potential dubious actions and gore? I mean he's a demon. Who knows! Just roleplay with caution.)

Added another starter message for your own scenarios!
creator: Lottylotl
